items.question: What is VPS hosting?
items.answer: VPS (Virtual Private Server) hosting provides dedicated resources within a virtualized environment. Unlike shared hosting, you get guaranteed CPU, RAM, and storage that aren't shared with other users.

items.question: Do I get full root access?
items.answer: Yes! All our VPS plans include full root access, giving you complete control over your server environment.

items.question: Can I upgrade my VPS plan later?
items.answer: Absolutely! You can scale your VPS resources up or down at any time through our control panel.

items.question: What operating systems are available?
items.answer: We support Ubuntu, Debian, CentOS, AlmaLinux, and more. You can also upload custom ISOs.

contact.heading: Need Help Choosing the Right Plan?
contact.description1: Book a short call with our team. One of WebblyHosting's specialists will help you choose the right hosting package based on your website, business goals, and budget. We want to make your decision simple and stress-free.
contact.description2: By submitting your details, you agree to WebblyHosting contacting you for support and guidance regarding your hosting needs.
